headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 13, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Cleveland, dropping a 2-3 decision to the Guardians. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Brooks Kriske (Athletics) who was placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. Other notable injuries include Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins) with a left elbow UCL sprain, Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets) with a right meniscus tear, and Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels) with left elbow inflammation.

The San Francisco Giants made a trade, sending C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels, striking out 7 batters.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings and striking out 6 batters. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and a 1-for-3 batting line.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with a final score of 10-4. Daylen Lile led the Nationals' offense with a strong performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes earning the win after 8.0 IP, 10 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 2 H. Gregory Soto secured the save for the Pirates.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Adley Rutschman and Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense. Kyle Bradish was instrumental in the win, pitching effectively for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 2-4 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, marking their defeat in the matchup. Impact players for the Angels included Zach Neto and Reid Detmers, while Parker Messick stood out for the Guardians.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Lands on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury update marks a status change for Kriske.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
